<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="sv">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />

  <title>Trading för nybörjare | Gratis guide</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Ladda ner en gratis svensk guide för trading och investeringar." />

  <style>* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
  color: #101010;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.hero {
  min-height: 650px;
  background: #f1f1f1;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.hero-bg {
  position: absolute;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-bg-left {
  width: 600px;
  height: 380px;
  left: -150px;
  bottom: -200px;
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.hero-bg-right {
  width: 460px;
  height: 280px;
  right: -55px;
  top: -15px;
  border-radius: 0 0 0 100%;
}

.hero-inner {
  width: min(1120px, calc(100% - 48px));
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.05fr 0.95fr;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.hero-copy {
  text-align: center;
  justify-self: center;
  max-width: 620px;
}

.hero-copy h1 {
  margin: 0 0 30px;
  font-size: clamp(3.1rem, 6vw, 4.9rem);
  line-height: 1.03;
  letter-spacing: -2.35px;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: #050505;
}

.hero-copy p {
  margin: 0 auto 34px;
  max-width: 560px;
  color: #151515;
  font-size: 1.17rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-width: 335px;
  min-height: 68px;
  padding: 18px 34px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 0;
  background: #087a43;
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 1rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.hero-book {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  position: relative;
}

.hero-book::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  width: 265px;
  height: 265px;
  right: 54px;
  bottom: 28px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,0,0,.18), rgba(0,0,0,.06) 48%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 72%);
  filter: blur(12px);
}

.hero-book img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  width: min(345px, 100%);
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 22px 34px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22));
}

.steps {
  padding: 84px 24px 96px;
  background: #ffffff;
}

.section-heading {
  width: min(820px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto 44px;
  text-align: center;
}

.section-heading h2 {
  margin: 0 0 16px;
  font-size: clamp(2.05rem, 4vw, 3.35rem);
  line-height: 1.07;
  letter-spacing: -1.3px;
  color: #101010;
}

.section-heading p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #5c6870;
  font-size: 1.12rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.step-grid {
  width: min(1080px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 22px;
}

.step-card {
  background: #f7faf7;
  border: 1px solid #e2ebe3;
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 30px;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}

.icon {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
  margin: 0 auto 18px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2rem;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}

.step-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  color: #111111;
  font-size: 1.22rem;
}

.step-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #627079;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.center {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 42px;
}

.download {
  padding: 76px 24px 100px;
  background: #f4f8f5;
}

.download-inner {
  width: min(1080px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 0.9fr 1.1fr;
  gap: 34px;
  align-items: center;
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 34px;
  padding: 44px;
  box-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.14);
}

.stars {
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  color: #f5b81f;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.download-copy h2 {
  margin: 0 0 18px;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.15rem);
  line-height: 1.08;
  letter-spacing: -1.1px;
}

.download-copy p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #5c6870;
  font-size: 1.04rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.small-book {
  width: 190px;
  height: auto;
  margin-top: 22px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 16px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.16));
}

.lead-form {
  background: #f7faf7;
  border: 1px solid #e1e9e2;
  border-radius: 26px;
  padding: 28px;
}

.form-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 14px;
}

label {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  color: #1c3022;
  font-size: .9rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

input,
select {
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 7px;
  border: 1px solid #d7e1d8;
  background: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 14px 15px;
  font: inherit;
  outline: none;
}

input:focus,
select:focus {
  border-color: #087a43;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(8,122,67,.12);
}

.checkbox-label {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333333;
}

.checkbox-label input {
  width: auto;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.honeypot {
  position: absolute;
  left: -9999px;
}

.submit {
  width: 100%;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.fine-print {
  margin: 14px 0 0;
  text-align: center;
  color: #728078;
  font-size: .8rem;
}

.success-message,
.error-message {
  display: none;
  margin: 16px 0 0;
  text-align: center;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.success-message.show {
  display: block;
  color: #087a43;
}

.error-message.show {
  display: block;
  color: #b42318;
}

footer {
  padding: 28px;
  text-align: center;
  background: #081016;
  color: #b8c6bd;
}

footer p {
  margin: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .hero {
    padding: 58px 0;
  }

  .hero-inner,
  .download-inner {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .download-copy {
    display: grid;
    justify-items: center;
  }

  .step-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }

  .hero-book {
    margin-top: 16px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 620px) {
  .hero-inner {
    width: min(100% - 32px, 1120px);
  }

  .hero-copy h1 {
    font-size: 2.72rem;
    letter-spacing: -1.2px;
  }

  .hero-copy p {
    font-size: 1rem;
  }

  .cta {
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .hero-book img {
    width: min(290px, 92vw);
  }

  .steps,
  .download {
    padding-left: 16px;
    padding-right: 16px;
  }

  .step-grid,
  .form-row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .download-inner {
    padding: 24px;
    border-radius: 24px;
  }

  .lead-form {
    padding: 22px;
  }
}
</style>
</head>

<body>
  <main>
    <section class="hero" id="top">
      <div class="hero-bg hero-bg-left"></div>
      <div class="hero-bg hero-bg-right"></div>

      <div class="hero-inner">
        <div class="hero-copy">
          <h1>Trading har äntligen<br />blivit enkelt</h1>
          <p>
            Behärska principerna som många nya traders aldrig lär sig,
            så att du kan bygga en tydligare plan och komma igång på rätt sätt.
          </p>
          <a class="cta" href="#lead-form">Ladda ner gratis guiden</a>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-book">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Handel för nybörjare guidebok" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="steps">
      <div class="section-heading">
        <h2>Praktiska steg och exempel för framgångsrik trading</h2>
        <p>Följ enkla steg i guiden för att förstå marknaden och göra din första investering mer strukturerad.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="step-grid">
        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">📈</span>
          <h3>Hur fungerar börsen</h3>
          <p>Förstå grunderna bakom prisrörelser, aktier, index och hur marknaden fungerar.</p>
        </article>

        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">💰</span>
          <h3>Börja med en liten insats</h3>
          <p>Lär dig varför det är klokt att börja försiktigt och utveckla en plan innan du ökar risken.</p>
        </article>

        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">🧭</span>
          <h3>6 sätt att investera pengar</h3>
          <p>Jämför olika vägar in på marknaden och välj en metod som passar dina mål.</p>
        </article>

        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">🛡️</span>
          <h3>Skydda mot förluster</h3>
          <p>Skapa regler för risk, positioner och stop loss så att kapitalet skyddas bättre.</p>
        </article>

        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">📊</span>
          <h3>Läsa finansiella rapporter</h3>
          <p>Se vilka siffror som spelar roll och hur rapporter kan hjälpa dig fatta bättre beslut.</p>
        </article>

        <article class="step-card">
          <span class="icon">🏦</span>
          <h3>Ta ut vinster</h3>
          <p>Planera när du ska sälja, säkra vinster och undvika vanliga nybörjarmisstag.</p>
        </article>
      </div>

      <div class="center">
        <a class="cta" href="#lead-form">Ladda ner gratis guiden</a>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="download" id="lead-form">
      <div class="download-inner">
        <div class="download-copy">
          <p class="stars">⭐ Mer än 10 000 nedladdningar ⭐</p>
          <h2>Ladda ner din kostnadsfria guide</h2>
          <p>
            Guiden <strong>Handel för nybörjare</strong> ger dig en lättläst introduktion
            till trading, riskhantering och bättre beslutsrutiner. Fyll i formuläret så sparas
            din lead direkt i Google Sheet.
          </p>
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Guideomslag" class="small-book" />
        </div>

        <form class="lead-form" id="leadForm">
          <div class="form-row">
            <label>
              First Name
              <input type="text" name="firstName" placeholder="First Name" required />
            </label>

            <label>
              Last Name
              <input type="text" name="lastName" placeholder="Last Name" required />
            </label>
          </div>

          <label>
            E-mail address
            <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="name@example.com" required />
          </label>

          <div class="form-row">
            <label>
              Country Code
              <select name="countryCode">
                <option value="+46 Sverige">+46 Sverige</option>
                <option value="+1 United States">+1 United States</option>
                <option value="+44 United Kingdom">+44 United Kingdom</option>
                <option value="+971 UAE">+971 UAE</option>
                <option value="+91 India">+91 India</option>
              </select>
            </label>

            <label>
              Phone Number
              <input type="tel" name="phone" placeholder="Phone Number" required />
            </label>
          </div>

          <input type="hidden" name="comment" value="nyborjare" />

          <div class="form-row">
            <label>
              City
              <input type="text" name="city" placeholder="City" />
            </label>

            <label>
              Postal Code
              <input type="text" name="postalCode" placeholder="Postal Code" />
            </label>
          </div>

          <label class="checkbox-label">
            <input type="checkbox" name="consent" value="Yes" required />
            I agree to be contacted about the guide.
          </label>

          <input class="honeypot" type="text" name="website" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off" />

          <button class="cta submit" type="submit">Ladda ner gratis guiden</button>

          <p class="fine-print">
            Genom att skicka formuläret godkänner du att bli kontaktad om guiden.
          </p>

          <p class="success-message" id="successMessage">
            Tack! Din information har skickats.
          </p>

          <p class="error-message" id="errorMessage">
            Något gick fel. Försök igen.
          </p>
        </form>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <footer>
    <p>©2026 All rights reserved.</p>
  </footer>

  <script>const GOOGLE_SCRIPT_URL = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxOEMtndXzP2l4X_zCfzv-_1iMli2zTvAj-kLyplJ2YCtvt7d-pnecqvmwkC9wTa-8x/exec";

const leadForm = document.getElementById("leadForm");
const successMessage = document.getElementById("successMessage");
const errorMessage = document.getElementById("errorMessage");

leadForm.addEventListener("submit", async function (event) {
  event.preventDefault();

  successMessage.classList.remove("show");
  errorMessage.classList.remove("show");

  const formData = new FormData(leadForm);

  if (formData.get("website")) {
    return;
  }

  formData.append("pageUrl", window.location.href);
  formData.append("userAgent", navigator.userAgent);
  formData.append("source", "bettertrading-style-landing-page");

  const button = leadForm.querySelector("button[type='submit']");
  const originalButtonText = button.textContent;
  button.disabled = true;
  button.textContent = "Skickar...";

  try {
    await fetch(GOOGLE_SCRIPT_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      mode: "no-cors",
      body: formData
    });

    leadForm.reset();
    successMessage.classList.add("show");
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    errorMessage.classList.add("show");
  } finally {
    button.disabled = false;
    button.textContent = originalButtonText;
  }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
